blockingIssues.description: ActionCard timestamp fields and mock values use Date objects, but GET /api/actions returns JSON-serialized timestamps (strings), so mock shape does not exactly match API response requirements.
client/src/__tests__/actions-page.test.ts does not import/render ActionsPage; it tests helper logic in node-only mode, so required component-level behavior coverage is not validated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit exception path for types-only/static-data features so strict RED-first TDD is not forced when no behavior exists to test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature phase2-types-and-mock-data reported a deviation from RED-first because work was limited to shared type declarations and static mock data files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a commit-scope rule that implementation features must avoid unrelated .factory artifacts unless the feature explicitly requests them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature phase2-types-and-mock-data commit included unrelated files (.factory/docs/phase2-backend-validation-assertions.md and .factory/validation/phase2-cross-area/assertions.md).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce explicit agent-browser verification (or a documented exemption) and accurate skillFeedback reporting when manual UI checks are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature phase2-actions-page-ui transcript showed no agent-browser usage despite frontend-worker procedure requiring it and handoff marking followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify testing standards for UI milestones: if component-level assertions are required, mandate a DOM-capable test setup (or revise contracts to allow logic-only verification).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Validation contract VAL-UI-014 requires component tests, but project Vitest config is environment='node' and tests were written as helper logic checks.
